title: Sonic.EXE
description: A Minecraft Horror Mod including a lot of .exe characters and CreepyPastas Such As Sonic.EXE, Lord X, Exetior etc.
body:
**Requires GECKOLIB** This Mod is a horror mod that includes CreepyPasta characters those are mostly Sonic.EXE related.The following characters are featured in the mod:
- _-Sonic.EXE/2011X (from "SONIC 2011") by JoeDoughBoi
- -Lord X (from "Soulles Sonic Series") by JoeDoughBoi
- -Broken Face/2017X (from "AWAKENING") by Alepie
- -Exetior (from "Nightmare Universe") by JaizKoys
- -Negagen (from "Nightmare Universe") by JaizKoys
- -Exelator (from "Exelator Series") by Hold32
- -D.E.X.(from "Soulles Sonic Fan Universe") by .darklox_

 

**NOTE:**I Didn't Ask This Mod's Owner For Permission For Sonic.EXE's Model,Sounds And Texture.The Mod Can Be Removed In Any Time.

So Please Don't Thank Me For The Mod, Thank These People Below
The Creator Of The Model:ValeraBro12
The Voice Actor Of X:GoshaCher360
